creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is most likely a problem with your local version (please nuke 
everything and csup again, and/or use a different mirror to valide this) 
or machine related (bad memory or something), since this had not been 
reported by others at all and our tinderboxen also dont show this 
message. Therefor I am closing ticket, thanks for using FreeBSD and for 
the willingness to help!
